values.description: The debugging symbols for the packages installed.

Similar Sound Search uses a non-generative machine learning model to search audio files in your Media Pool databases. You can search for sounds that are similar to a selected file or to a description of a sound you type in the search field. Copyright 2025 Sony Group Corporation.

The C++ include files and several configurations of the compiled libraries and symbols, which are required by both the Unity and Unreal Integrations. SDK code samples and documentation are also included.
The Wwise User Guide PDF and the Wwise Help CHM.

The C++ source code of the Wwise SDK. A license for the Source Code is required per Deployment Platform, the license status can be viewed in the Customer Portal. Contact Audiokinetic sales for more information.
A LUA interpreter with Wwise SDK bindings.
The unit tests for the packages installed.

children.description: Mastering Suite is a cross-platform high quality mastering solution providing subtle to surgical manipulation to your mix. Support various rendering scenarios by controlling the dynamic range, equalization curve, limiting and gain of individual channels.
children.name: Mastering Suite

children.description: Reflect is a geometry-informed plug-in that dynamically renders early reflections based on the proximity of the listener/emitter to reflective surfaces, such as walls, ceilings, and floors.
children.name: Reflect

children.description: Soundseed Air includes two sound generator plug-ins. Soundseed Wind creates seamlessly looping exterior ambiences, aircraft engines and other air displacement based special effects. Soundseed Woosh creates close combat swooshes, bullet flybys and other motion sounds.
children.name: Soundseed Air

children.description: Auro-3D® is the next generation three-dimensional audio standard. It provides the most immersive and natural realistic 3D sound experience.
children.name: Auro Headphone

children.description: iZotope offers a suite of their most popular sound design plug-ins for use directly within Wwise. The suite of Trash tools and Hybrid Reverb can take your sound design projects to the next level.
children.name: iZotope suite

children.description: McDSP brings a selection of their award-winning plug-ins directly to Wwise: FutzBox Lo-Fi Distortion and ML1 Mastering Limiter.
children.name: McDSP ML1, McDSP Futzbox
Integration Demo
children.description: Code samples (C++) demonstrating different aspects of the Wwise SDK, with the companion Wwise project.
This free plug-in uses the Steinberg Audio Stream Input/Output (ASIO) SDK in order to connect to ASIO compatible devices. It can be used as an Audio Device (output) or as a source plug-in (input).
children.name: AK ASIO
